metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Web Session ASIM parser for Salesforce Service Cloud
properties.query:
let parser=(disabled:bool=false, pack:bool=false) {
  let EventTypeLookup = datatable (EventOriginalType: string, EventType: string) [
      "ApiTotalUsage",    "ApiRequest",
      "RestApi",          "ApiRequest",
      "BulkApi2",         "ApiRequest",
      "ApexCallout",      "ApiRequest",
      "ExternalODataCallout", "ApiRequest",
      "MetadataApiOperation", "ApiRequest",
      "NamedCredential",  "ApiRequest",
      "URI",              "WebServerSession",
      "AuraRequest",      "WebServerSession",
      "LightningPageView","WebServerSession",
      "LightningPerformance", "WebServerSession",
      "LightningInteraction", "WebServerSession",
      "UiTelemetryResourceTiming", "WebServerSession",
      "UiTelemetryNavigationTiming", "WebServerSession",
      "CSPViolation",     "WebServerSession"
  ];
  let WebSessionEventTypes = dynamic([
      "ApiTotalUsage", "RestApi", "BulkApi2", "ApexCallout",
      "ExternalODataCallout", "MetadataApiOperation", "NamedCredential",
      "URI", "AuraRequest", "LightningPageView", "LightningPerformance",
      "LightningInteraction", "UiTelemetryResourceTiming",
      "UiTelemetryNavigationTiming", "CSPViolation"
  ]);
  SalesforceServiceCloudV2_CL
  | where not(disabled)
  | where EventType in (WebSessionEventTypes)
  | project-rename EventOriginalType = EventType
  | lookup EventTypeLookup on EventOriginalType
  | extend
      // -- URL handling
      Url = coalesce(Url, Uri),
      _UrlHost = extract(@"https?://([^/:?#]+)", 1, Url)
  | extend
      DstFQDN = iff(_UrlHost has ".", _UrlHost, ""),
      DstHostname = iff(isnotempty(_UrlHost), extract(@"^([^.]+)", 1, _UrlHost), ""),
      DstDomain = extract(@"^[^.]+\.(.*)", 1, _UrlHost),
      DstDomainType = iff(_UrlHost has ".", "FQDN", "")
  | extend
      // -- Event fields
      Type = "SalesforceServiceCloudV2_CL",
      EventCount              = int(1),
      EventStartTime          = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime            = TimeGenerated,
      EventSchema             = "WebSession",
      EventSchemaVersion      = "0.2.7",
      EventVendor             = "Salesforce",
      EventProduct            = "Salesforce Service Cloud",
      EventProductVersion     = ApiVersion,
      EventSeverity           = "Informational",
      // -- Event result based on HTTP status code
      EventResultDetails      = StatusCode,
      EventResult             = case(
                                  isempty(StatusCode),         "NA",
                                  toint(StatusCode) between (100 .. 399), "Success",
                                  toint(StatusCode) between (400 .. 599), "Failure",
                                  "NA"
                                ),
      EventOriginalResultDetails = StatusCode
  | extend
      // -- HTTP fields
      HttpRequestMethod       = HttpMethod,
      HttpStatusCode          = EventResultDetails,
      HttpUserAgent           = coalesce(HttpUserAgentOriginal, HttpUserAgent, UserAgent),
      HttpReferrer            = coalesce(HttpReferrerOriginal, ReferrerUri),
      // -- Source fields
      SrcIpAddr               = coalesce(ClientIp, SourceIp, SrcIpAddr),
      SrcUserId               = UserId,
      SrcUserIdType           = iff(isnotempty(UserId), "SalesforceId", ""),
      SrcUsername             = coalesce(UserEmail, User),
      
      SrcUserType             = case(
                                  UserType == "Standard" or UserType == "S", "Regular",
                                  UserType == "X", "Admin",
                                  ""
                                ),
      SrcBytes                = tolong(RequestSize),
      SrcDvcId                = coalesce(SrcDvcId, DeviceId),
      SrcDvcModelName         = coalesce(SrcDvcModelName, DeviceModel),
      SrcDvcOs                = OsName,
      // -- Destination fields
      DstBytes                = tolong(coalesce(DstBytes, ResponseSize)),
      DstAppName              = "Salesforce Service Cloud",
      DstAppType              = "SaaS application",
      // -- Device fields
      Dvc                     = "Salesforce Service Cloud",
      DvcScopeId              = OrganizationId,
      // -- Network fields
      NetworkDuration         = toint(Duration),
      NetworkSessionId        = SessionKey,
      // -- TLS
      TlsVersion              = TlsProtocol,
      TlsCipher               = CipherSuite
  | extend
    SrcUsernameType         = case(
                                  isnotempty(SrcUsername) and SrcUsername has "@", "UPN",
                                  isnotempty(SrcUsername), "Simple",
                                  ""
                                )
  | extend
      // -- Conditional fields
      SrcDvcIdType            = iff(isnotempty(SrcDvcId), "Other", ""),
      // -- Dst alias: use the best available destination identifier
      Dst                     = coalesce(DstFQDN, DstHostname, DstAppName),
      // -- Src alias
      Src                     = SrcIpAddr,
      // -- Aliases
      IpAddr                  = SrcIpAddr,
      User                    = SrcUsername,
      UserAgent               = HttpUserAgent,
      Hostname                = DstHostname,
      Duration                = NetworkDuration,
      SessionId               = NetworkSessionId
  | extend
      // -- AdditionalFields
      AdditionalFields = iff(
          pack,
          bag_pack(
              "ApiVersion",       ApiVersion,
              "ApiType",          ApiType,
              "SessionType",      SessionType,
              "BrowserName",      BrowserName,
              "BrowserVersion",   BrowserVersion,
              "OsVersion",        OsVersion,
              "PlatformType",     PlatformType,
              "DevicePlatform",   DevicePlatform,
              "ConnectionType",   ConnectionType,
              "RequestId",        RequestId,
              "Quiddity",         Quiddity,
              "ExecTime",         ExecTime,
              "TotalTime",        TotalTime,
              "CpuTime",          CpuTime,
              "DbTotalTime",      DbTotalTime,
              "DbCpuTime",        DbCpuTime,
              "RowsProcessed",    RowsProcessed,
              "IsLongRunningRequest", IsLongRunningRequest
          ),
          dynamic({})
      )
  | project
      // -- Mandatory
      TimeGenerated,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventType,
      EventResult,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      Dvc,
      Url,
      Dst,
      // -- Recommended
      EventResultDetails,
      EventSeverity,
      HttpRequestMethod,
      HttpStatusCode,
      DstHostname,
      DstBytes,
      SrcIpAddr,
      SrcBytes,
      ASimMatchingIpAddr = "SrcIpAddr",
      ASimMatchingHostname = "DstHostname",
      // -- Event optional
      EventOriginalType,
      EventOriginalResultDetails,
      EventProductVersion,
      // -- HTTP optional
      HttpUserAgent,
      HttpReferrer,
      // -- Destination optional
      DstFQDN,
      DstDomain,
      DstDomainType,
      DstAppName,
      DstAppType,
      // -- Source fields
      SrcUserId,
      SrcUserIdType,
      SrcUsername,
      SrcUsernameType,
      SrcUserType,
      SrcDvcId,
      SrcDvcIdType,
      SrcDvcModelName,
      SrcDvcOs,
      // -- Device fields
      DvcScopeId,
      // -- Network fields
      NetworkDuration,
      NetworkSessionId,
      // -- TLS
      TlsVersion,
      TlsCipher,
      // -- Additional
      AdditionalFields,
      // -- Aliases
      IpAddr,
      User,
      UserAgent,
      Hostname,
      Duration,
      SessionId,
      Src,
      // -- Source table
      Type
};
parser(disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
